title: methods: split methods.rs into per-type-family modules
description:
Split crates/jmap-chat/src/methods.rs into a module tree:
- methods/mod.rs (re-exports all)
- methods/chat.rs (Chat/get, Chat/query, Chat/changes + new Chat/set, Chat/typing, Chat/queryChanges)
- methods/contact.rs (ChatContact/get + new /changes, /set, /query, /queryChanges)
- methods/message.rs (Message/get, /query, /changes, /set + new edit/delete/reactions/readAt, /queryChanges)
- methods/space.rs (new Space/* methods)
- methods/misc.rs (ReadPosition, PresenceStatus, SpaceInvite, SpaceBan, CustomEmoji)

No behavior change — this is pure restructure. All existing tests must still pass.
